home.title: Build Powerful Digital Systems for Your Business
home.subtitle: Nexara builds high-performance websites and custom accounting systems for modern businesses.
home.servicesSubtitle: We combine modern web engineering with robust financial systems to power your entire digital operation.
home.portfolioDesc: From business websites to fan platforms and accounting software — browse our latest projects.
home.integratedDesc: Nexara provides integrated digital infrastructure combining cutting-edge websites and robust accounting systems to streamline and scale your modern business operations.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We design and deliver complete digital systems — from stunning websites to powerful accounting platforms — built to perform from day one.

web.title: Website Development
web.desc: Professional, modern business websites built with the latest technologies. Designed to impress visitors and convert them into customers.

landing.title: Landing Page Development
landing.desc: High-conversion landing pages built for marketing campaigns, product launches, and lead generation. Every element is crafted to drive action.

accounting.title: Accounting Software
accounting.desc: Custom-built accounting and financial management systems tailored to your business workflows. Simplify your finances with smart, automated tools.

services.ctaTitle: Not sure which service you need?
services.ctaDesc: Tell us about your project and we'll recommend the best approach. No fee for consultations.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Selected projects we've designed and delivered for clients across different industries.
portfolio.ctaText: Want to see your project here?

fullmark.title: Full Mark Work
fullmark.desc: A professional agency portfolio website showcasing digital services, previous work, and client success stories.

lomda.title: Lomda Website
lomda.desc: A clean and modern business website built for a professional services company with a focus on brand presentation.

tamer.title: Tamer Hosny AI Documentary
tamer.desc: An AI-powered interactive documentary website celebrating the legendary Egyptian artist Tamer Hosny, featuring rich visuals and dynamic content.

ashraf.title: Ashraf Tech
ashraf.desc: A modern technology company website featuring responsive design, service showcases, and a clean professional look tailored for a tech brand.

islam.title: Islam Fawzy
islam.desc: A personal branding website for a professional, featuring a portfolio section, bio, and contact integration with a sleek modern aesthetic.

aboutrika.title: Aboutrika Legend
aboutrika.desc: An engaging fan website celebrating the legendary Egyptian footballer, with rich visuals, career timeline, and tribute content.

accounting.title: Accounting Software
accounting.desc: A custom-built accounting and financial management system for businesses. Includes invoicing, reporting, and multi-user dashboards.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Fixed prices for fixed deliverables. No hidden fees, no surprises. Every project includes deployment and post-launch support.
pricing.note: All prices are in USD. Custom projects are scoped individually.
